ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "loan_amnt" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "int_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status (e.g., RENT, MORTGAGE) */,
  "annual_inc" INTEGER /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the loan application */,
  "issue_d" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., low_risk, high_risk) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., home purchase, personal, business) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the borrower (e.g., employed, self-employed) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the borrower (e.g., high school, bachelor’s, master’s) */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, business, rental) */,
  "co_applicant" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a co-applicant */,
  "co_applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the co-applicant (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application associated with the credit score */,
  "dti" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio of the borrower */,
  "delinq_2yrs" INTEGER /* Number of delinquencies in the past 2 years */,
  "inq_last_6mths" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries in the last 6 months */,
  "open_acc" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts */,
  "pub_rec" INTEGER /* Number of public records */,
  "revol_bal" INTEGER /* Revolving balance */,
  "total_acc" INTEGER /* Total accounts */,
  "fico_score" INTEGER /* FICO credit score */,
  "credit_history_length" INTEGER /* Length of credit history in months */,
  "recent_credit_inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of credit inquiries in the last 3 months */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio (total debt / total credit limit) */,
  "public_records_10yrs" INTEGER /* Number of public records in the last 10 years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application associated with the borrower */,
  "annual_inc" INTEGER /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the loan application */,
  "issue_d" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., low_risk, high_risk) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the borrower */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "ssn_last_4" TEXT /* Last 4 digits of the Social Security Number (for identification purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowers_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application associated with the payment */,
  "total_pymnt" REAL /* Total payment amount */,
  "total_pymnt_inv" REAL /* Total payment amount invoiced */,
  "total_rec_prncp" REAL /* Total principal amount received */,
  "total_rec_int" REAL /* Total interest amount received */,
  "total_rec_late_fee" REAL /* Total late fee amount received */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., on time, late, missed) */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Amount of late payment fee if applicable */,
  "late_payment_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the payment was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit inquiry */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower associated with the credit inquiry */,
  "inq_last_12m" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries in the last 12 months */,
  "inq_fi" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries from financial institutions */,
  "total_cu_tl" INTEGER /* Total number of credit accounts */,
  "inq_last_6mths" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries in the last 6 months */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the credit inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the credit inquiry (e.g., mortgage, auto loan) */,
  "inquiry_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit inquiry (e.g., bank, credit bureau) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_inquiries_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)
